label: identity
notes: Identity — model determinism + L2-normalization sanity. Anything below 0.999 indicates noise.

label: paraphrase-high-overlap
a: how do I reset my password
b: how can I reset my password
notes: Trivial paraphrase, near-total token overlap. Should score near identity.

label: paraphrase-moderate-overlap
b: how do I reset my password
notes: Realistic search query pair; some shared content words.

label: paraphrase-no-overlap
notes: Paraphrase with ZERO shared content words. Probes lexical-overlap weakness (tern-future-work §13). TBD verdict — informational.

label: same-domain-related
notes: Same domain, related actions, shared domain tokens. Typical developer query distribution.

label: same-template-diff-topic
notes: Probes whether the model favors syntactic structure or content. Interesting either way.

label: related-concepts-no-overlap
notes: Conceptually related, no shared tokens. Tests learned semantic understanding.

label: antonym-probe
notes: Antonym / negation probe. Embedding models often miss this — same template + topic, opposite sentiment. TBD verdict — informational.

label: negative-anchor
notes: Completely unrelated topics. Hard negative anchor — should be clearly low.

label: gibberish-negative
notes: Out-of-vocab garbage vs sensible. Secondary negative anchor.
